purpose: BNB Agent SDK ERC-8004 identity dry-run and live-registration guardrails.
wallet_address_source: Track 1 BSC wallet after registration and funding decision
dry_run_command: uv run defiquant bnb-register --config configs/strategy.json --agent-url https://example.com --wallet-address 0x9206D8416A11c5E54427fE5f226B3Ed384a266Cc --network bsc-testnet --dry-run

live_registration.command_reference_only: uv run defiquant bnb-register --config configs/strategy.json --agent-url https://example.com --wallet-address 0x9206D8416A11c5E54427fE5f226B3Ed384a266Cc --network bsc-testnet --live --confirm-live I_UNDERSTAND_BNB_AGENT_REGISTRATION_RISK

evidence_to_capture: registration transaction hash after approved live registration
DoraHacks submission screenshot or confirmation URL
